# Latent-diffusion (LDM) + evaluation track.
# Create a venv that inherits the conda env's PyTorch (torch 2.1.2 / cu121),
# then install these on top:
#   python -m venv --system-site-packages env/ldm_venv
#   source env/ldm_venv/bin/activate
#   pip install -r env/requirements-ldm.txt
diffusers==0.27.2
accelerate==0.27.2
huggingface-hub==0.20.3
safetensors==0.7.0
pytorch-fid==0.3.0
top-pr==0.2.1
